core.name: Asuna
core.backstory: Asuna is the wandering swordswoman of Suntail Village, usually found at the south gate training yard. Known as brave, decisive, protective, Asuna has become tangled in the effort to protect Suntail Village from creatures moving down from the mountains. Privately, Asuna carries a dangerous secret: She fled an arranged noble marriage and hides her family name from visiting officials.

relationships.Loen: patrol partner whose woodland instincts she trusts
relationships.Nicole: accepts village contracts from her but dislikes council politics
relationships.Sanji: a close friend whose meals she quietly looks forward to

dynamic.current_goal: Continue daily work as wandering swordswoman while protecting this secret: She fled an arranged noble marriage and hides her family name from visiting officials
